basic_details.job_title: GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT)
basic_details.short_information: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Senior Research Fellow Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow: M. Sc. Ag (Agronomy/Soil Science/ Agricultural Economics) with one year field experience in field crops in laying demonstrations at farmer field.

salary_details.details: Senior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: gbpuat.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Senior Research Fellow position at GBPUAT is 15th June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. Ag degree in Agronomy, Soil Science, or Agricultural Economics. Additionally, one year of field experience in field crops, specifically in laying demonstrations at the farmer's field, is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Research Fellow position will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Fellow position in the G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Senior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Fellow position will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology, Pantnagar, Uttarakhand, with a pincode of 263145.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Senior Research Fellow position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
